title: Business Simulations
lead: Immersive simulation exercises that help teams experience and learn new ways of working in a safe, realistic environment — making operating model change tangible before it happens.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.body: Business simulations are serious games that place participants in realistic scenarios where they experience the consequences of process, governance, and collaboration choices first-hand. Unlike lectures or workshops, simulations create a safe environment where teams can fail fast, reflect, and adjust — building shared understanding and urgency for change. In ITOM engagements, simulations are used to accelerate alignment, demonstrate the 'why' behind operating model transformation, and build the behavioural skills that new ways of working require.

sections.heading: ITOM Perspective
sections.body: Designing a new IT Operating Model is one thing — getting people to understand and embrace it is another. Business simulations bridge this gap. By experiencing the pain of a broken operating model in a game setting, participants arrive at ITOM workshops with shared context and genuine motivation for change. Simulations are particularly effective for cross-functional groups (business and IT together) and for senior stakeholders who need to feel the business impact of IT operating model decisions, not just read about them.

items.desc: create shared understanding and urgency at the start of an ITOM transformation programme
bring business and IT leaders together in a non-threatening, high-engagement format
demonstrate new ways of working experientially — more effective than telling people to change
embed and reinforce learning from frameworks like ITIL, Agile, or DevOps in a practical context
build collaboration skills, shared language, and cross-functional trust
Simulation facilitation — certified facilitation of business simulation workshops for teams of 8–24 participants
Custom scenario design — tailor simulation scenarios to the client's specific operating model context
Debrief facilitation — structured reflection sessions connecting simulation experience to real ITOM challenges
Multi-day learning journeys — combine simulations with ITOM workshops for immersive transformation programmes
